content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is firmly risk-on with Nifty +0.76%, Pharma +2.70%, Metal +2.02%, IT +1.56%, and VIX down -4.82% to 18.76. Global cues supportive (Nasdaq +1.63%). Existing book is participating well — 5 of 7 holdings green. Priority is to manage existing winners (trail SLs per mandate) rather than chase fresh breakouts mid-session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13%) and PSU bank momentum intact. Stock recovered to 79.61 from intraday low. Tightening SL from 76 to 77.50 (just below S2 78.36 buffer / recent low 78.51) to reduce risk on a position currently underwater. Target unchanged at 85 (near 52w high 82.15 + breakout extension)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +6.6%, trailing SL mandate triggered (>4%). Current SL 1035.47 is already above entry. Loosening would be illegal; instead tightening slightly to 1020 would be a LOOSEN (below current). Keeping current SL at 1035.47 is best — but emitting MODIFY only if it tightens further. Actually current SL 1035.47 already locks in ~5% gain; moving to 1020 is LOOSER. Skip MODIFY — convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +6.6%. Current SL 1035.47 is already above entry (984), locking in ~5% gain — better than the standard trail level of max(entry, last-2%) = max(984, 1028) = 1028. SL is appropriately tight. Target 1100 still ~5% away, intact (52w high 1141.90). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near flat. SL at 119 gives ~5% room which is appropriate for an ETF with ATR-low behaviour. Binary FOMC Apr 29 ahead — do not adjust into the event. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock printed 52w high today (1437.90); strong Q4 (PAT +27%, double-digit volume growth). Current SL 1418 is already at breakeven+. Per no-op rule, since new values equal stored values, switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 690.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.8%, fresh 52w high (703.65). Trailing mandate: trail to max(entry 681, last 701.85 - 2% = 687.81) = 687.81. Tightening SL from 685 to 690 locks in gain just below today's open 690 and above breakeven. Target 725 unchanged. Note: Q4 results Apr 29 (binary event) — tighter SL warranted. R:R from 701 to 725 = +24 vs 690 SL = -11, ratio 2.2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.1%. Q4 results binary event Apr 30 (3 days). SL at 2260 (~4.7% below entry) is reasonable pre-event. Not tightening into a binary catalyst with a stop too tight risks getting whipsawed. HOLD into earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.0% — below the +2% threshold to mandate trailing to breakeven. Stock at 52w high (407.25). SL at 396 is ~2.7% below entry, appropriate. Wait for clearer move above 410 before tightening. Q4 results May 15."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 110,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 443.00,
      "stop_loss": 425.00,
      "target": 470.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Tata Power breaking above 52w high (440.80) with strong sector momentum (Energy +0.99%, Bullish Engulfing pattern Apr 20). Already hold NTPC — power cluster exposure becoming concentrated. Cluster check: NTPC 50,650 + Tata Power proposed ~48,730 = ~99k = ~9.8% — under 20% cluster cap. Position size ~5% (low conviction near 0.6, conservative sizing). Risk: 4% SL × 5% size = 0.20% portfolio risk, within 0.5% budget. R:R = (470-443)/(443-425) = 27/18 = 1.5:1 minimum. Catalysts: summer demand, May 12 board meeting."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 76 to 77.50 to reduce risk on losing position; thesis intact post Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035.47 already locks in ~5% gain above entry — already optimally trailed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near flat, FOMC Apr 29 binary risk — do not adjust SL into event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already above entry 1412.94; appropriately trailed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 690.00,
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.8%; trail SL above today's open and breakeven into Apr 29 earnings binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 30; tight SL pre-event risks whipsaw. SL at 2260 reasonable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.0% below 2% trailing threshold; current SL 396 appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA (+7% on Organon catalyst) and INDUSINDBK (Q4 beat) are interesting but extended intraday. Wait for next-day pullback. UTIAMC AVOID (Q4 net loss, -11% on results). ABSLAMC at ATH — Equirus target 1100 already met, no edge. TORNTPOWER, ANANTRAJ — would create cluster overlap with TATAPOWER add. SAIL/HINDZINC for metals exposure on a base test day, not after +2% sector day.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with +0.50% session P&L; healthy posture. After TATAPOWER add, deployment moves to ~55%. Power cluster (NTPC + TATAPOWER) ~10% — within bounds but no further power adds today. Pharma cluster (GRANULES) at ~5%, FMCG (NESTLEIND + HUL) ~7%, financials cluster (PNBHOUSING + MAHABANK) ~15%. Multiple binary events approaching (FOMC Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30) — primary task this week is risk management, not aggressive new entries. Win rate 5% over 5 days is concerning small sample; profit factor 1.4 acceptable. Continue tightening winners and letting them run."
}
